metadata.title: Drovar — retail outlet fit-out
metadata.description: We design and manufacture modern shop fittings. We deliver projects from concept through transport to professional installation.

hero.title: Retail outlet fit-out
hero.subtitle: We design and build your retail outlet's interior — from initial concept to a ready-to-use retail space.

slides.1: Design sketch — shop shelving and glazed counter
slides.2: Design sketch — bar interior with counter and stools
slides.3: Design sketch — shop fitting with counter and display stands
slides.4: Design sketch — shop interior with showcases and wall units
slides.5: Design sketch — convenience store with bakery shelving
slides.6: Design sketch — modern shop fitting in warm wood

offer.title: What we do
offer.subtitle: We specialise in manufacturing fittings for shops and retail spaces.

shelves.title: Shop shelving
shelves.description: Functional shelving tailored to the product range and shop layout.

counters.title: Sales counters
counters.description: Ergonomic checkout and sales counters designed to meet service needs.

displays.title: Display modules
displays.description: Attractive modules for product presentation and promotions.

wallUnits.title: Wall units
wallUnits.description: Wall units that maximise the use of available space.

convenience.title: Convenience stores
convenience.description: Complete fittings for convenience stores and small-format outlets.

tobacco.title: Tobacco shops
tobacco.description: Specialist fittings for tobacco shops and retail points of sale.

singleShops.title: Individual shops
singleShops.description: Tailored to your premises, quick quotation, full service from design to installation.

chains.title: Retail chains
chains.description: Standardisation, repeatability, logistics and installations across multiple locations simultaneously.

experience.title: International experience
experience.description: Projects delivered in Poland and across European markets.

fullService.title: Full-service delivery
fullService.description: Design, manufacturing, transport and installation — all under one roof.

custom.title: Bespoke solutions
custom.description: Tailored to the premises, product range and character of your business.

proven.title: Proven system
proven.description: A tried-and-tested production and logistics system ensuring consistency.

onTime.title: On-time delivery
onTime.description: We meet agreed deadlines through precise planning.

realizations.title: Our projects
realizations.subtitle: Selected shop projects completed in Poland and abroad.
realizations.pageSubtitle: We present selected shop projects completed in Poland and abroad. Every project is tailored to the space, client needs and character of the business.

assembly.title: Installation and transport
assembly.description: We have specialised installation teams and a trusted logistics partner. This allows us to efficiently deliver even the most demanding projects — from delivery to professional installation.
assembly.subtitle: We ensure smooth execution according to the agreed schedule.

about.title: About us
about.paragraph1: We specialise in manufacturing shop fittings tailored to individual client needs. We focus on functionality, aesthetics and high build quality.
about.paragraph2: We deliver projects for small retail outlets and large commercial spaces — in Poland and abroad. Thanks to years of experience, we provide solutions that help shops operate and sell more effectively.

contactPreview.title: Interested in working together?
contactPreview.description: Have an idea for a new shop or planning to refurbish an existing one? Get in touch — we will prepare a concept and quotation tailored to your project.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: If you'd like to discuss collaboration or arrange a meeting, send us a message — we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
